findingsList.text: 🟡 test/cli-commands.test.mjs:273 — Pin the exit code (`assert.equal(result.code, 1)`) rather than only `result.ok === false`; a thrown exception would currently still satisfy the test.
🟡 test/cli-commands.test.mjs:276 — Tighten to `output.includes("agt brainstorm my-feature")` so a broken `featureName` interpolation (`undefined`/wrong slug) is caught.
